nodes.label: AI as ideation partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like using AI to help me when I have a question or to help me ideate things

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: it adds time to their day instead of making things more efficient

nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.grounding_span: It cannot seem to keep this contextual information

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as complement to human skills
nodes.grounding_span: That feels like something AI could do

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: It would be great if I could trust it with this repetitive task, but I cannot

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: This takes time away from the other tasks I need to do for the day

nodes.label: Creative exploration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: It sends me in a direction and then we discuss possible outcomes

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: This is a time of being adaptive and flexible if you want to keep your job

nodes.label: Positive discovery of AI's engagement potential
nodes.grounding_span: I like using AI to help me when I have a question or to help me ideate things

nodes.label: Resignation about management ignoring issues
nodes.grounding_span: we are told it is our fault. (It is not.) Or they simply ignore our concerns

nodes.label: Proactive adaptation to AI disruption
nodes.grounding_span: My job is to stay on top of all AI tools so that I can prove/show I am an asset on top of AI

nodes.label: Conversational back-and-forth reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to have a back-and-forth as I don't find AI to ever be spot-on with the ideation process

nodes.label: Systematic verification through source checking
nodes.grounding_span: it is my job not just to edit the report but to check every single screenshot used within the report
